# Cabir Çelik

> Portfolio of Cabir Çelik — Lead Data Scientist focused on healthcare AI, clinical NLP, and LLM-powered medical assistants. Projects, research publications, and writing.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of work in healthcare AI and clinical NLP.
- [Projects](/projects): Selected projects across clinical NLP, medical multimodal chatbots, and computer vision for healthcare.
- [Blogs](/blogs): Research papers and articles on RAG, assertion detection, clinical de-identification, and healthcare LLM systems.
- [About](/about): Bio, professional experience, education, and areas of expertise.
- [Contact](/contact): Email, location, languages, and professional profiles.

## Featured

- [Clinical NLP 101](/blogs/clinical-nlp-101): A practical introduction to clinical natural language processing — entities, assertions, de-identification, and where to start.

## Optional

- [Source](/source): Reading list and resources.
- [Colleagues](/colleagues): Cross-functional team of engineers and designers.
